title: Zoom warns of critical account takeover vulnerability
description: Zoom is warning of a critical vulnerability in its desktop client and software development kit for Windows that could be exploited by an unauthenticated party to hijack accounts.

title: Zilog Z80 turns 50 as an open-source replacement heads to drop-in DIP40 silicon — iconic 8-bit CPU launched in July 1976 and was discontinued in 2024 | Tom's Hardware
description: The Z80 powered many retro favorites like the ZX Spectrum, TRS-80, MSX, Game Boy, Master System, Pac-Man arcade cabinet, and many more

title: The Legendary Zilog Z80 CPU Is Being Discontinued After Nearly 50 Years - Slashdot

title: Dev hopes to save legendary Z80 chip with open source clone — resurrects iconic Zilog chip with drop-in Z80 replacement | Tom's Hardware
description: Owners of the retro Sinclair ZX Spectrum might have a source for CPU replacements despite the Z80's retirement.

title: Zilog (re-)introduces the Z80 - Slashdot
